name: academic-research-skills
description: Academic research, writing, review, and publication workflow skills adapted for Codex from the seth-lu fork.

interface.shortDescription: Research, write, review, revise, and finalize academic papers.
interface.longDescription: A four-skill academic workflow for Codex covering deep research, paper drafting, peer-style review, revision orchestration, citation checks, and finalization. Adapted from the seth-lu fork of academic-research-skills.
defaultPrompt: Research this topic and build an evidence-backed outline.
Review this academic paper and propose revisions.
